description:
You are a data quality analyst at the SF Planning Department. Conduct a data quality audit of the buildings dataset at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/buildings_with_errors.csv using the reference data at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 to identify and repair all data anomalies using statistically defensible methods. Perform the analysis in the /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/data_quality_audit.ipynb notebook using the UrbanSim (Python 3) kernel.

Deliver the following:
- /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/quality_report.csv: A report with columns for issue_type, records_affected, repair_method, and records_repaired.
- /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/buildings_repaired.csv: The repaired dataset.
- /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/quality_audit_chart.png: A bar chart showing the count of records affected per issue type.
